About

The dojo behind the edits

editorsdojo is a freelance video editing brand built around discipline, clarity, and cinematic storytelling. The goal is simple: turn raw footage into short-form content that looks premium, holds attention, and helps personal brands communicate with more impact.

I'm currently focused on helping creators, coaches, entrepreneurs, and personal brands improve the way their content looks and feels online.

Built for attention, clarity, and trust.

Owned Media Experience

Hands-on content, not just theory

I also own and manage @anime.segments, an Instagram theme page with 9K+ followers. Running it gives me real experience with content consistency, audience taste, hooks, and visual presentation — the same skills I bring to client edits.

Get Started

Raw footage in. Premium content out.

Simple, sharp, and story-driven. Let's see what your content can look like with a free sample edit.

Book a Free Sample Edit

Edit with discipline.
